verses.text: Those of the circumcision contend that Peter went to the uncircumcised. Narrow zeal. They cannot yet see grace beyond Israel.
Those of the circumcision contend that Peter went to the uncircumcised. Narrow zeal. They cannot yet see grace beyond Israel.
Those of the circumcision contend that Peter went to the uncircumcised. Narrow zeal. They cannot yet see grace beyond Israel.
Peter rehearses the vision of the sheet let down from heaven. Plain account. He answers their charge by telling what God showed.
Peter rehearses the vision of the sheet let down from heaven. Plain account. He answers their charge by telling what God showed.
Peter rehearses the vision of the sheet let down from heaven. Plain account. He answers their charge by telling what God showed.
A voice said, Rise, kill, and eat; 'What God hath cleansed, that call not thou common'; done thrice. God's word. The vision taught that none is unclean whom God receives.
A voice said, Rise, kill, and eat; 'What God hath cleansed, that call not thou common'; done thrice. God's word. The vision taught that none is unclean whom God receives.
A voice said, Rise, kill, and eat; 'What God hath cleansed, that call not thou common'; done thrice. God's word. The vision taught that none is unclean whom God receives.
A voice said, Rise, kill, and eat; 'What God hath cleansed, that call not thou common'; done thrice. God's word. The vision taught that none is unclean whom God receives.
Three men came; the Spirit bade me go; the angel told Cornelius to send for words of salvation. Clear leading. God arranged every step of the meeting.
Three men came; the Spirit bade me go; the angel told Cornelius to send for words of salvation. Clear leading. God arranged every step of the meeting.
Three men came; the Spirit bade me go; the angel told Cornelius to send for words of salvation. Clear leading. God arranged every step of the meeting.
Three men came; the Spirit bade me go; the angel told Cornelius to send for words of salvation. Clear leading. God arranged every step of the meeting.
The Holy Ghost fell on them as on us; 'what was I, that I could withstand God?' No resisting. Peter dared not refuse what God plainly did.
The Holy Ghost fell on them as on us; 'what was I, that I could withstand God?' No resisting. Peter dared not refuse what God plainly did.
The Holy Ghost fell on them as on us; 'what was I, that I could withstand God?' No resisting. Peter dared not refuse what God plainly did.
They held their peace and glorified God, 'then hath God also to the Gentiles granted repentance unto life.' Joyful surrender. They bow to the grace they cannot deny.
The scattered preach to Jews, but some tell the Greeks of the Lord; 'a great number believed.' Widening gospel. Persecution carries the word to the nations.
The scattered preach to Jews, but some tell the Greeks of the Lord; 'a great number believed.' Widening gospel. Persecution carries the word to the nations.
The scattered preach to Jews, but some tell the Greeks of the Lord; 'a great number believed.' Widening gospel. Persecution carries the word to the nations.
Barnabas, sent to Antioch, 'a good man, and full of the Holy Ghost,' exhorts them to cleave to the Lord. A faithful encourager. He rejoices in the grace he sees and urges steadfastness.
Barnabas, sent to Antioch, 'a good man, and full of the Holy Ghost,' exhorts them to cleave to the Lord. A faithful encourager. He rejoices in the grace he sees and urges steadfastness.
Barnabas, sent to Antioch, 'a good man, and full of the Holy Ghost,' exhorts them to cleave to the Lord. A faithful encourager. He rejoices in the grace he sees and urges steadfastness.
He brings Saul; for a year they teach, and 'the disciples were called Christians first in Antioch.' A new name. Christ's followers bear His name to the world.
He brings Saul; for a year they teach, and 'the disciples were called Christians first in Antioch.' A new name. Christ's followers bear His name to the world.
Foretold a famine, the disciples send relief to Judaea. Practical love. Faith shows itself in caring for needy brethren.
Foretold a famine, the disciples send relief to Judaea. Practical love. Faith shows itself in caring for needy brethren.
